# Data Exchange Reports

The Data Exchange Reports screen provides you with the following report options:

- Authorization ID Listing – the current details for the Authorization ID.

- Service Event Report – historical details on the individual services that have accessed the Spectrum database.

- Authorization Event Report – historical details on what sub screens have been entered for a given Authorization ID.

Each report has associated selection criteria and sort options available. View sample reports in the [Authorization Setup Manual](https://trimble.deploy.heretto.com/v4/deployments/mVyHSMAo9PbkfqcxUBWF/object/b9e543b0-8ea9-11ec-9179-02420ae60f1a?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..xnEDy_jMybaQrV2DFZjj9VHw_fkJlrsb4FqZqnGrKh0&response-content-disposition=filename%3D%22SDX_AUTHORIZATION_SETUP_v1421.pdf%22).
